description.value: Aura faint abjuration; CL 5th; Weight â; Slot none; Price 1,000 gp DESCRIPTION This bead is carved with a tiny pictogram representing a small, harmless animal such as a newt, rabbit, or frog. If the bearer fails a saving throw against a hostile polymorph effect such as baleful polymorph, the bead is destroyed and the effect does not affect the bearer. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, dispel magic; Cost 500 gp
